name: Hit Chance Bounds
description: Replaces vanilla's 5%-95% hit-chance caps with 0%-100% for both gameplay calculations and the values displayed on the Character Screen.

patches.description: Allow the Character Screen to reach the patched 0% display lower bound
Set gameplay lower bound path 1 to 0
Set display lower bound path to 0
Set gameplay lower bound path 2 to 0
Set gameplay upper bound path 1 to 100
Set display upper bound path to 100
Set gameplay upper bound path 2 to 100
